strengths: Demonstrated proficient bimanual coordination during vessel manipulation
Applied clips with appropriate jaw visibility and positioning
weaknesses: Performed vessel clipping procedure instead of required ligating loop task
Failed to recognize task requirements despite clear instructions
Did not use the loop or knot pusher components essential for task3

drills.name: Task identification rehearsal
drills.description: Review task3 requirements and practice identifying the loop, appendage, and knot pusher before starting any movements.
drills.targets_weakness: Failed to recognize task requirements despite clear instructions.

drills.name: Loop opening and parking
drills.description: 10 repetitions of opening the loop and parking it around the target appendage before tightening.
drills.targets_weakness: Did not use the loop or knot pusher components essential for task3.

drills.name: Mark-centering drill
drills.description: Place the loop at the target mark, pause, and verify alignment before cinching.
drills.targets_weakness: Performed vessel clipping procedure instead of required ligating loop task.

progression_note: At the intermediate level, task recognition is fundamental before technical execution. Focus on understanding task3 components and sequence before attempting speed improvements.
